title: Resize columns. Why is there a minimum width for the Item Column?
excerpt: Is there any way to properly resize the first column on a board? Right now it takes up half the screen width and I cannot drag it to the left beyond that.

posts.author: Cornelius (Cornelius Engelhardt)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any way to properly resize the first column on a board? Right now it takes up half the screen width and I cannot drag it to the left beyond that.

posts.author: IvarV (Ivar V)
posts.cookedHtml: Others have this issue too - the main thread is at Resizing left/first column

posts.author: IvarV (Ivar V)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m not sure if this should be considered a feature request - it seems like more of a bug to me. Is there a different track to report issues like this?

posts.author: rich-ecologic-sips (Rich Amos)
posts.cookedHtml: The thread Ivar mentions has now been closed and marked with being solved. Whilst the solution does help somewhat it still doesn’t fully solve the issue and I don’t understand why we are not given the functionality of being able to resize the first column.
